_meta.authority: Republic Act No. 11199 (Social Security Act of 2018)
notes: Official SSS bracket table is published as image only on sss.gov.ph; algorithmic MSC rounding (₱500 increments, rounded to nearest) reproduces the bracketing.
Total contribution rate: 15% of MSC. Employer share: 10%. Employee share: 5%.
Contributions on MSC portion above ₱20,000 are allocated to MySSS Pension Booster (mandatory provident fund, MPF) — separate sub-account but still part of payroll deduction.

msc._comment: MSC = round(monthlyCompensation / 500) * 500, clamped to [min, max]. Portion of MSC above regular_ss_cap goes to MPF.

ec._threshold_comment: EC = low_amount if MSC ≤ 14,500; EC = high_amount if MSC ≥ 15,000.
